parameters.name: invert
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Inverts the selection of elements being deleted.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.label: Entity
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class to use.

parameters.name: linestripbehavior
parameters.label: Line Strip Behavior
parameters.description: What to do when points of a line strip are deleted.

parameters.name: cpureadback
parameters.label: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.description: Enable copying the point count and topology information held on the to the CPU.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0combine
parameters.label: Combine
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the current attribute condition block with the one above.

parameters.name: attr0inattr
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Name of attribute for conditions.

parameters.name: attr0func
parameters.label: Function
parameters.description: Comparison function used to determine which elements are selected based on its attribute value.

parameters.name: attr0value
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the selection resulting from the current conditions in the block.

parameters.name: thinenabled
parameters.label: Enabled
parameters.description: Enable thinning by index range, index step or random index.

parameters.name: thinoutrange
parameters.label: Thin Out Range
parameters.description: Enable index-based point filtering.

parameters.name: thinrangestart
parameters.label: Thin Range Start
parameters.description: Determines the starting index for range-based point filtering.

parameters.name: thinrangelength
parameters.label: Thin Range Length
parameters.description: Determines the number of points being filtered by index range.

parameters.name: thinstep
parameters.label: Thin Step
parameters.description: Filters every Nth point.

parameters.name: thinrandom
parameters.label: Thin Random
parameters.description: Determines the proportion of points randomly filtered.

parameters.name: thinrandomseed
parameters.label: Thin Random Seed
parameters.description: Sets the random seed for points being randomly filtered.

parameters.name: thininvert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the selection resulting from the current conditions in the block.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.label: Pattern
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for index-matching pattern.

parameters.name: pattern0combine
parameters.label: Combine
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the current pattern block with the one above.

parameters.name: pattern0pattern
parameters.label: Pattern
parameters.description: Index-matching pattern. see in wiki.

parameters.name: pattern0invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the selection resulting from the current conditions in the block.

parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: group0combine
parameters.label: Combine
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the current group block with the one above.

parameters.name: group0name
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: The name of the group to use.

parameters.name: group0invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the selection resulting from the current conditions in the block.

parameters.name: bound
parameters.label: Bound
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for bounding volumes.

parameters.name: bound0combine
parameters.label: Combine
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the current bounding volume block with the one above.

parameters.name: bound0inattr
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Name of position attribute for bounding volume.

parameters.name: bound0type
parameters.label: Bounding Type
parameters.description: The type of bounding volume, Sphere or Box.

parameters.name: bound0invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the selection resulting from the current conditions in the block.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: bound0translatez
parameters.label: Bound0Translatez
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: bound0scalez
parameters.label: Bound0Scalez
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: bound0rotatez
parameters.label: Bound0Rotatez
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
